roadmap.title: Regular route through the three isles
roadmap.description: Clear Isles I–III on Regular difficulty, aim for A-ranks while learning each boss, finish the Mausoleums, collect coins, and complete the Run 'n' Gun P-ranks.

roadmap.title: Inkwell Hell, endings, and base mastery
roadmap.description: Clear King Dice without damage if possible, view the contract-surrender ending before refusing The Devil, finish the Regular ending, and establish the Expert and S-rank requirements.

roadmap.title: The Delicious Last Course
roadmap.description: Clear Isle IV with Ms. Chalice and a DLC weapon, complete the King's Leap and Saltbaker quest, solve the graveyard, transform the Cursed Relic, and finish the DLC challenge achievements.

roadmap.title: Expert and final S-rank cleanup
roadmap.description: Earn an Isle IV S-rank and defeat all 19 main-game bosses on Expert difficulty, using the completed equipment collection to tailor each fight.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Win an Inkwell Isle I fight against Goopy Le Grande or The Root Pack.

guide.context: Simple difficulty is sufficient for this first victory, although later rank and completion achievements require Regular or Expert clears.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Botanic Panic!} or @loc{Ruse of an Ooze} on Simple or Regular difficulty.
Win the boss fight in the selected stage and reach the results screen.

achievements.description: Defeat every boss in Inkwell Isle I
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Clear Inkwell Isle I by beating The Root Pack and Ribby and Croaks; then defeat Goopy Le Grande, Hilda Berg, and Cagney Carnation.

guide.context: The five Isle I contracts open the route to Inkwell Isle II; Simple clears count for progression but cannot earn an A-rank.

collectibles.name: The Root Pack
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{The Root Pack} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Ribby and Croaks
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Ribby and Croaks} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Goopy Le Grande
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Goopy Le Grande} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Hilda Berg
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Hilda Berg} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Cagney Carnation
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Cagney Carnation} on any available difficulty.

achievements.description: Defeat every boss in Inkwell Isle II
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Clear Inkwell Isle II by beating Baroness von Bon Bon and Beppi the Clown; also defeat Djimmi the Great, Grim Matchstick, and Wally Warbles.

guide.context: Clearing all five Isle II contracts opens Inkwell Isle III; airplane and ground bosses both count.

collectibles.name: Baroness von Bon Bon
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Baroness von Bon Bon} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Djimmi the Great
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Djimmi the Great} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Beppi the Clown
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Beppi the Clown} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Wally Warbles
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Wally Warbles} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Grim Matchstick
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Grim Matchstick} on any available difficulty.

achievements.description: Defeat every boss in Inkwell Isle III
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Clear all seven Inkwell Isle III fights: defeat Rumor Honeybottoms, Sally Stageplay, and Cala Maria, plus Dr. Kahl's Robot, Werner Werman, Captain Brineybeard, and Phantom Express.

guide.context: The seven contracts from Isle III complete the set needed to enter Inkwell Hell and confront King Dice.

collectibles.name: Rumor Honeybottoms
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Rumor Honeybottoms} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Dr. Kahl's Robot
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Dr. Kahl's Robot} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Sally Stageplay
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Sally Stageplay} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Werner Werman
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Werner Werman} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Captain Brineybeard
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Captain Brineybeard} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Cala Maria
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Cala Maria} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Phantom Express
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Phantom Express} on any available difficulty.

achievements.description: Complete the Casino
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Clear the Inkwell Hell casino by defeating every mini-boss encountered on the chosen board route and then defeating King Dice.

guide.context: Rolling 2, 4, and 8 with Safe spaces between them gives a relatively manageable route through Chips Bettigan, Pip and Dot, and Mangosteen before the finale.

steps.text: Enter @loc{All Bets Are Off!} after collecting every main-game Soul Contract.
Parry the die to move across the board and clear every mini-boss space on the chosen route without landing on Start Over.
Reach FIN and defeat @enemy{King Dice} to complete the casino.

achievements.description: Refuse The Devil and defeat him.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Refuse The Devil's demand for the Soul Contracts and defeat him in One Hell of a Time!

guide.context: The final dialogue branches immediately: accepting the demand gives the bad ending, while refusing starts The Devil's boss fight.

steps.text: After defeating @enemy{King Dice}, enter @loc{One Hell of a Time!} and approach @npc{The Devil}.
Select @mechanic{No} when The Devil asks for the Soul Contracts.
Defeat @enemy{The Devil} and finish the resulting ending sequence.

achievements.description: Give the Soul Contracts to The Devil.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Give The Devil the Soul Contracts by selecting Yes at his final demand.

guide.context: This branch ends at the dialogue choice instead of starting The Devil's boss fight.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{King Dice}, enter @loc{One Hell of a Time!}, and approach @npc{The Devil}.
Select @mechanic{Yes} when The Devil asks whether you will hand over the Soul Contracts.
Watch the bad-ending sequence until the achievement unlocks.

achievements.description: Get an S-Rank
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: After completing the main game, earn an S rank on Expert against Goopy Le Grande or The Root Pack.

guide.context: An S rank requires Expert difficulty, at least 3 HP remaining, three scored parries, six Super Meter uses, and the boss-specific time limit; a Super Art contributes five meter uses.

steps.text: Complete the main game once to unlock @mechanic{Expert} difficulty.
Start @loc{Botanic Panic!} or @loc{Ruse of an Ooze} on Expert difficulty.
Finish within the displayed target time with at least 3 HP, three scored parries, and six Super Meter uses.
Complete the fight and confirm an @mechanic{S} grade on the results screen.

achievements.description: Obtain an A-Rank or higher on all bosses in Inkwell Isle I
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Earn A- or better against every boss in Inkwell Isle I on Regular or Expert difficulty.

guide.context: Simple difficulty caps the result below A-. A strong score balances completion time, remaining HP, three scored parries, and six Super Meter uses; a Super Art supplies five meter uses.

collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{The Root Pack} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

guide.context: Simple difficulty caps the result below A-. A strong score balances completion time, remaining HP, three scored parries, and six Super Meter uses; a Super Art supplies five meter uses.

collectibles.name: King Dice
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{King Dice} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

collectibles.name: The Devil
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{The Devil} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

achievements.description: Complete the game on Normal
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Defeat every main-game boss on Regular difficulty, refuse The Devil's demand, and defeat The Devil.

guide.context: Simple victories advance the map but do not satisfy the Normal-completion requirement, so any Simple-only boss must be replayed on Regular or Expert.

steps.text: Defeat all five bosses in @loc{Inkwell Isle I}, all five in @loc{Inkwell Isle II}, and all seven in @loc{Inkwell Isle III} on Regular difficulty.
Defeat @enemy{King Dice} on Regular difficulty in @loc{All Bets Are Off!}.
Select @mechanic{No} at The Devil's demand and defeat @enemy{The Devil} on Regular difficulty.

achievements.displayName: Beat The Devil At His Own Game
achievements.description: Complete the game on Expert
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Defeat all 19 main-game bosses—including King Dice and The Devil—on Expert difficulty.

guide.context: Expert unlocks after the main game is completed. The six Run 'n' Gun stages have no Expert version and are not part of this achievement.

collectibles.name: The Root Pack

achievements.description: Buy everything in Porkrind's Shop
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Buy Spread, Chaser, Lobber, Charge, Roundabout, Heart, Smoke Bomb, P. Sugar, Coffee, Whetstone, and Twin Heart from Porkrind's Emporium.

guide.context: The eleven base-game purchases cost 40 coins in total. Coins from The Delicious Last Course can also pay for these base-game items.

collectibles.name: Spread
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Spread} for 4 coins.

collectibles.name: Chaser
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Chaser} for 4 coins.

collectibles.name: Lobber
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Lobber} for 4 coins.

collectibles.name: Charge
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Charge} for 4 coins.

collectibles.name: Roundabout
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Roundabout} for 4 coins.

collectibles.name: Heart
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Heart} for 3 coins.

collectibles.name: Smoke Bomb
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Smoke Bomb} for 3 coins.

collectibles.name: P. Sugar
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{P. Sugar} for 3 coins.

collectibles.name: Coffee
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Coffee} for 3 coins.

collectibles.name: Whetstone
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Whetstone} for 3 coins.

collectibles.name: Twin Heart
collectibles.method: Purchase @item{Twin Heart} for 5 coins.

achievements.description: Use a hidden path on an Inkwell Isle.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Walk through the hidden Inkwell Isle I shortcut beneath the airplane tutorial, to the right of Goopy Le Grande.

guide.context: Each of the first three isles has a shortcut, but the Isle I path is available earliest and requires no boss-specific challenge.

steps.text: Go to @loc{Inkwell Isle I} and stand to the right of @loc{Ruse of an Ooze}, below the airplane tutorial platform.
Walk behind the foreground terrain and follow the concealed path until you emerge on the other side.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss with an Extra Special move
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Land the killing blow on any boss with a one-card weapon EX attack or airplane EX attack.

guide.context: Simple difficulty and King Dice mini-bosses are valid, so an early boss can be weakened before saving one Super Meter card for the finisher.

steps.text: Enter an easy boss fight such as @enemy{The Root Pack} and build at least one full Super Meter card.
Damage the boss until it is near defeat without spending the final card.
Use the equipped weapon's @mechanic{EX attack} for the killing blow and finish the results screen.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss with a Super Art
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Land the killing blow on any boss with Energy Beam, Giant Ghost, or an airplane Super Art.

guide.context: The Invincibility Super Art cannot deal the final damage and therefore does not qualify; Simple difficulty and King Dice mini-bosses remain valid.

steps.text: Complete at least one Mausoleum and equip a damaging @mechanic{Super Art}, such as Energy Beam.
Enter an easy boss fight, fill all five Super Meter cards, and weaken the boss near defeat.
Activate the damaging Super Art for the killing blow and complete the results screen.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss using only mini-plane bullets.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Defeat Mr. Chimes, King Dice's number 9 mini-boss, using only mini-plane bullets.

guide.context: Mr. Chimes has comparatively light dodging pressure, making him the safest casino target for this restriction.

steps.text: Enter @loc{All Bets Are Off!} and manipulate the die so the route reaches space 9, @enemy{Mr. Chimes}.
Switch to mini-plane form as soon as the fight begins.
Use only mini-plane bullets until Mr. Chimes is defeated; do not fire normal-plane bullets, EX attacks, bombs, or a Super Art.

achievements.description: Obtain all Super Arts
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Complete Mausoleum I, Mausoleum II, and Mausoleum III to obtain Energy Beam, Invincibility, and Giant Ghost.

guide.context: Mausoleums are defensive parry stages rather than conventional bosses; protect the central urn by parrying every ghost before it reaches the vessel.

collectibles.name: Energy Beam
collectibles.method: Complete Mausoleum I to receive @mechanic{Energy Beam}.

collectibles.name: Invincibility
collectibles.method: Complete Mausoleum II to receive @mechanic{Invincibility}.

collectibles.name: Giant Ghost
collectibles.method: Complete Mausoleum III to receive @mechanic{Giant Ghost}.

achievements.description: Complete a level without getting hit
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Finish an Isle I fight against Goopy Le Grande or The Root Pack without losing any HP.

guide.context: Any boss fight and any available difficulty can qualify; the predictable Isle I bosses provide the earliest low-risk attempts.

steps.text: Start @loc{Botanic Panic!} or @loc{Ruse of an Ooze} on a comfortable difficulty.
Restart immediately after any hit so the completed attempt retains all starting HP.
Defeat the boss without taking damage and reach the results screen.

achievements.description: Get every coin in all of the levels
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Collect all five coins in each of the six Run 'n' Gun stages, for 30 level coins total.

guide.context: A coin is saved only when the stage is completed; dying requires collecting that attempt's coins again.

collectibles.name: Forest Follies
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins in @loc{Forest Follies} and finish the stage alive.

collectibles.name: Treetop Trouble
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins in @loc{Treetop Trouble} and finish the stage alive.

collectibles.name: Funfair Fever
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins in @loc{Funfair Fever} and finish the stage alive.

collectibles.name: Funhouse Frazzle
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins in @loc{Funhouse Frazzle} and finish the stage alive.

collectibles.name: Rugged Ridge
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins in @loc{Rugged Ridge} and finish the stage alive.

collectibles.name: Perilous Piers
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins in @loc{Perilous Piers} and finish the stage alive.

achievements.description: Parry five times before hitting the ground
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Parry the pink balloon at the start of Funfair Fever five times consecutively without touching the ground.

guide.context: The balloon remains parryable after each bounce, so matching its horizontal movement keeps the chain away from the floor.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Funfair Fever} in Inkwell Isle II and reach the pink balloon near the beginning.
Jump into the balloon and press parry on contact, then steer in the balloon's direction.
Parry the same balloon four more times before Cuphead touches the ground.

achievements.description: Complete 20 parries
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 20 successful parries across any stages or the tutorial.

guide.context: The tutorial's pink parry targets refresh indefinitely, so the counter can be completed without risking a boss attempt.

steps.text: Return to the @loc{Tutorial} and reach the section with the suspended pink parry targets.
Parry the refreshing targets until the cumulative counter reaches 20.

achievements.description: Complete 100 parries
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 100 successful parries across any stages or the tutorial.

guide.context: Parries persist cumulatively, and the tutorial's targets respawn indefinitely for deterministic cleanup.

steps.text: Return to the @loc{Tutorial} and reach the suspended pink parry targets.
Continue parrying the refreshing targets until the cumulative counter reaches 100.

achievements.description: Defeat King Dice without taking damage during the casino run.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Defeat every mini-boss encountered on the chosen casino board route and King Dice in one All Bets Are Off! attempt without taking damage.

guide.context: The no-hit condition covers the entire casino run, not only the King Dice phase; the 2–Safe–4–Safe–8–Safe route limits the run to three manageable mini-bosses.

steps.text: Enter @loc{All Bets Are Off!} and aim for spaces 2, 4, and 8 with Safe spaces between them.
Restart the entire casino attempt after any hit during Chips Bettigan, Pip and Dot, Mangosteen, or a different selected mini-boss.
Reach FIN and defeat @enemy{King Dice} without taking damage anywhere in the attempt.

achievements.description: Collect all 40 base-game coins.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Collect all 40 base-game coins: 30 from the six Run 'n' Gun stages and 10 from the tutorial, NPC rewards, and overworld hiding places.

guide.context: The three coins from Mac count among the ten non-level coins, while each Run 'n' Gun set is retained only after finishing its stage alive.

collectibles.name: Tutorial coin
collectibles.method: Complete the movement tutorial and collect the coin at its end.

collectibles.name: Mac's three coins
collectibles.method: Talk to @npc{Mac}, the apple NPC, and accept all three coins.

collectibles.name: Forest Follies coins
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins and complete Forest Follies alive.

collectibles.name: Treetop Trouble coins
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins and complete Treetop Trouble alive.

collectibles.name: Chip's hidden coin
collectibles.method: After defeating every Isle I boss, walk behind @npc{Chip}, the axe NPC, and collect the hidden coin.

collectibles.name: Buster's coin
collectibles.method: Parry four times before touching the ground, then talk to @npc{Buster}, the juggler NPC, for the coin.

collectibles.name: Ginger's coin
collectibles.method: Use the Isle II secret passage, then talk to @npc{Ginger}, the gingerbread NPC, for the coin.

collectibles.name: Funfair Fever coins
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins and complete Funfair Fever alive.

collectibles.name: Funhouse Frazzle coins
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins and complete Funhouse Frazzle alive.

collectibles.name: Green-cabin coin
collectibles.method: Collect the hidden coin behind the green cabin near Funhouse Frazzle.

collectibles.name: Rugged Ridge coins
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins and complete Rugged Ridge alive.

collectibles.name: Perilous Piers coins
collectibles.method: Collect all five coins and complete Perilous Piers alive.

collectibles.name: Ticket-booth coin
collectibles.method: Collect the hidden coin behind the ticket booth located behind Porkrind's Emporium.

collectibles.name: Casino-wall coin
collectibles.method: Collect the hidden coin behind the outside section of the left wall leading toward the casino.

achievements.description: Earn P-ranks on all six Run 'n' Gun stages.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Earn a P-rank in Forest Follies, Treetop Trouble, Funfair Fever, Funhouse Frazzle, Rugged Ridge, and Perilous Piers without killing enemies.

guide.context: Normal shots, EX attacks, and Super Arts invalidate a P-rank when they kill an enemy; parrying a pink enemy is permitted. Smoke Bomb and Invincibility help cross blocked passages.

collectibles.name: Forest Follies P-rank
collectibles.method: Reach the exit without killing an enemy; use a mushroom's pink projectile to bounce over the Acorn Maker.

collectibles.name: Treetop Trouble P-rank
collectibles.method: Reach the exit without killing an enemy; dash below the Dragonfly or jump and dash above it.

collectibles.name: Funfair Fever P-rank
collectibles.method: Reach the exit without killing an enemy; use Smoke Bomb to pass the Robot Monkeys, Cannon Walls, and Shooting Range, then cross above the Hot Dog.

collectibles.name: Funhouse Frazzle P-rank
collectibles.method: Reach the exit without killing an enemy; wait for each Two-Mouthed Wall to open and dash through with Smoke Bomb.

collectibles.name: Rugged Ridge P-rank
collectibles.method: Reach the exit without killing an enemy; parry the Gate Faces at their highest positions and dash through.

collectibles.name: Perilous Piers P-rank
collectibles.method: Reach the exit without killing an enemy and confirm the P grade on the results screen.

achievements.description: Defeat every boss in Inkwell Isle IV
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Defeat Moonshine Mob, Esther Winchester, The Howling Aces, Mortimer Freeze, and Glumstone the Giant in Inkwell Isle IV.

guide.context: These five contract bosses constitute the Isle IV world-completion set; Chef Saltbaker belongs to the separate quest-finale achievement.

collectibles.name: Moonshine Mob
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Moonshine Mob} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Esther Winchester
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Esther Winchester} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: The Howling Aces
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{The Howling Aces} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Mortimer Freeze
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Mortimer Freeze} on any available difficulty.

collectibles.name: Glumstone the Giant
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Glumstone the Giant} on any available difficulty.

achievements.description: Obtain an A-Rank or Higher on all bosses in Inkwell Isle IV
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Earn A- or better against every boss in Inkwell Isle IV on Regular or Expert difficulty.

guide.context: Simple difficulty caps the result below A-. A strong score balances completion time, remaining HP, three scored parries, and six Super Meter uses; a Super Art supplies five meter uses.

collectibles.name: Moonshine Mob
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Moonshine Mob} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

collectibles.name: Esther Winchester
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Esther Winchester} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

collectibles.name: The Howling Aces
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{The Howling Aces} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

collectibles.name: Mortimer Freeze
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Mortimer Freeze} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

collectibles.name: Glumstone the Giant
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Glumstone the Giant} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

collectibles.name: Chef Saltbaker
collectibles.method: Defeat @enemy{Chef Saltbaker} on Regular or Expert difficulty with a final grade of A-, A, A+, or S.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss with Ms. Chalice
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Equip the Astral Cookie to play as Ms. Chalice and defeat any boss.

guide.context: The Astral Cookie becomes available when the Isle IV introduction unlocks Ms. Chalice; equipping it replaces Cuphead or Mugman for the whole fight.

steps.text: Reach @loc{Inkwell Isle IV}, complete the introductory sequence, and equip the @item{Astral Cookie} charm.
Enter an easy boss fight such as @enemy{The Root Pack} while Ms. Chalice is active.
Defeat the boss and finish the results screen as @npc{Ms. Chalice}.

achievements.description: Defeat 10 bosses with Ms. Chalice
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Equip the Astral Cookie and complete 10 boss victories as Ms. Chalice.

guide.context: Any ten bosses in the base game or DLC count, so previously cleared Isle I and Isle II fights can be replayed on Simple difficulty.

steps.text: Equip the @item{Astral Cookie} so @npc{Ms. Chalice} is active.
Defeat ten bosses while Ms. Chalice remains active; replay easy bosses on Simple difficulty if desired.
Complete the tenth results screen as Ms. Chalice.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss with one of Ms. Chalice's Super Arts
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Land the killing blow on any boss with Ms. Chalice's Spiral Pillar Super Art.

guide.context: Shield Pal does not deal damage and therefore cannot satisfy the finishing-blow condition; an easy Isle I boss keeps retries short.

steps.text: Equip the @item{Astral Cookie} and select @mechanic{Spiral Pillar}, Ms. Chalice's damaging Super Art I.
Enter an easy boss fight, fill all five Super Meter cards, and weaken the boss near defeat.
Activate Spiral Pillar for the killing blow and finish the results screen as Ms. Chalice.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss with one of Porkrind's new weapons
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Defeat any boss using Converge, Twist-Up, or Crackshot, the weapons sold in the Isle IV version of Porkrind's Emporium.

guide.context: Crackshot's homing projectiles make it the simplest DLC weapon for keeping damage on an early boss while concentrating on dodges.

steps.text: Visit @loc{Porkrind's Emporium} on Inkwell Isle IV and buy @item{Converge}, @item{Twist-Up}, or @item{Crackshot}.
Equip the purchased DLC weapon and enter an easy boss fight such as @enemy{The Root Pack}.
Use the DLC weapon to defeat the boss and complete the results screen.

achievements.description: Defeat all of the King of Games' Champions
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Defeat the Pawns, Knight, Bishop, Rook, and Queen in the King of Games' five Champion challenges.

guide.context: The sky ladder relocates around Inkwell Isle IV after wins; walking around the island makes it appear again so the next Champion can be selected.

collectibles.name: Pawns
collectibles.method: Climb the sky ladder and defeat the @enemy{Pawns} Champion challenge.

collectibles.name: Knight
collectibles.method: Climb the sky ladder and defeat the @enemy{Knight} Champion challenge.

collectibles.name: Bishop
collectibles.method: Climb the sky ladder and defeat the @enemy{Bishop} Champion challenge.

collectibles.name: Rook
collectibles.method: Climb the sky ladder and defeat the @enemy{Rook} Champion challenge.

collectibles.name: Queen
collectibles.method: Climb the sky ladder and defeat the @enemy{Queen} Champion challenge.

achievements.description: Defeat the King's Gauntlet
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Select The Gauntlet from the King of Games and defeat the Pawns, Knight, Bishop, Rook, and Queen consecutively without dying.

guide.context: The Gauntlet appears only after all five individual Champion challenges are cleared, and HP is restored between its fights.

steps.text: Defeat the @enemy{Pawns}, @enemy{Knight}, @enemy{Bishop}, @enemy{Rook}, and @enemy{Queen} individually.
Return to @npc{The King of Games} and select the literal menu option @mechanic{The Gauntlet}.
Defeat all five Champions in the resulting boss rush without dying; choosing them individually does not count.

achievements.description: Complete your quest on Inkwell Isle IV
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Deliver ingredients won from Moonshine Mob, Esther Winchester, The Howling Aces, Mortimer Freeze, and Glumstone the Giant, then defeat Chef Saltbaker on Regular difficulty.

guide.context: The Bakery finale becomes available after the five Isle IV contract bosses are defeated and their ingredients have been collected.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Moonshine Mob}, @enemy{Esther Winchester}, @enemy{The Howling Aces}, @enemy{Mortimer Freeze}, and @enemy{Glumstone the Giant}.
Return to @loc{The Bakery} and enter @loc{A Dish to Die For} on Regular difficulty.
Defeat @enemy{Chef Saltbaker} and complete the Isle IV ending sequence.

achievements.description: Get an S-Rank on a stage of Inkwell Isle IV
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Earn an S rank against The Howling Aces or another Inkwell Isle IV boss on Expert difficulty.

guide.context: Expert for Isle IV unlocks after Chef Saltbaker is defeated. An S rank requires the target time, at least 3 HP, three scored parries, and six Super Meter uses; a Super Art contributes five uses.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Chef Saltbaker} to unlock Expert difficulty for Isle IV.
Start @loc{Doggone Dogfight} or another Isle IV boss stage on Expert difficulty.
Finish within the stage's target time with at least 3 HP, three scored parries, and six Super Meter uses.
Complete the fight and confirm an @mechanic{S} grade on the results screen.

achievements.description: Defeat a boss on Inkwell Isle IV without killing any of its minions
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Clear High-Noon Hoopla against Esther Winchester while leaving every flying pony minion alive.

guide.context: The flying ponies appear only during Esther's first phase, and Simple difficulty shortens the encounter while still allowing this achievement.

steps.text: Start @loc{High-Noon Hoopla} against @enemy{Esther Winchester} on Simple difficulty.
During phase one, aim every shot away from the flying pony minions that fire cactus balls; damage only Esther Winchester.
Complete the fight without killing a pony minion and finish the results screen.

achievements.description: Have 9HP at one time
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Reach 9 HP during the King Dice encounter by landing on every bonus-heart space and using Heart Ring to gain HP on the first, third, and sixth parries without taking damage.

guide.context: Heart Ring awards one HP after the first, third, and sixth parries. Patch 1.3.3 adjusted this achievement to unlock more consistently and made result-screen HP depend on remaining health.

steps.text: Equip the @item{Heart Ring} charm and start @loc{All Bets Are Off!} against King Dice.
Parry the die so the board route lands on every space marked with a bonus heart.
Accumulate six successful parries during the selected mini-bosses to receive all three Heart Ring HP rewards.
Avoid all damage until the health display reaches 9 HP.

achievements.displayName: A Horrible Night To Have a Curse
achievements.description: Defeat the Angel and Demon secret boss.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Solve the randomized graveyard code with the Broken Relic, then defeat the Angel and Demon secret boss.

guide.context: The first-, second-, and third-place contestants give a save-specific order: directional words such as up, down, left, and right identify each grave relative to the center stone.

steps.text: Buy the @item{Broken Relic} from @loc{Porkrind's Emporium} on Inkwell Isle IV.
At the contest podium northeast of the island, talk to the middle first-place NPC, the left second-place NPC, and the right third-place NPC; record each directional clue in placement order.
At the central graveyard, activate the three graves described by those clues in first-, second-, then third-place order.
Activate the center grave to enter the nightmare and defeat @enemy{Angel and Demon}.

achievements.description: Transform the Cursed Relic into the Divine Relic.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so prerequisite fights, equipment, and difficulty unlocks are available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Evolve the Cursed Relic by earning 16 boss points on Regular or Expert difficulty; its final form is the Divine Relic.

guide.context: Isle I and II bosses give 2 or 2.5 points, Isle III and IV bosses give 3, King Dice gives 1, and The Devil or Chef Saltbaker gives 4; Simple victories do not count.

steps.text: Defeat @enemy{Angel and Demon} so the Broken Relic becomes the @item{Cursed Relic}.
Equip the Cursed Relic and earn 10 points by defeating Cagney Carnation, Hilda Berg, Ribby and Croaks, Goopy Le Grande, and The Root Pack on Regular or Expert difficulty.
Keep the Cursed Relic equipped and defeat Werner Werman and Phantom Express on Regular or Expert difficulty for 6 more points.
After reaching 16 points, confirm that the charm has transformed into the @item{Divine Relic}.
